basic_details.job_title: CSMC Full Time Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) Full Time Medical Officer MBBS Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the CSMC Full Time Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Full Time Medical Officer MBBS: MBBS

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS posts is scheduled for 22 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post is MBBS. Candidates must possess this degree to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies available for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS post in the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the CSMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-, and for SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 250/-. This fee is payable at the time of the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Full Time Medical Officer MBBS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a direct walk-in interview and merit basis. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention any age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation. The exact venue details will be provided in the official notification.
